headline: Jim Cramer on Procter & Gamble: “It’s as Cheap as I’ve Seen It in Years”
summary: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s recent Mad Money game plan. Cramer said that it is “too soon for a turnaround” as he commented: Finally, on Friday, we hear from Procter & Gamble’s new CEO, and I think the quarter’s going to be weak. The last couple […]
